name: Have It Your Way Seafood Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Cheddar or American cheese, shredded
8 ounces Canned tuna, shrimp, OR crab
recipeInstructions:
1. Select mushroom, shrimp, or cheese-based cream soup.
2. Cook pasta or noodles according to directions. Drain and set aside.
3. Combine mayonnaise with milk or white wine.
4. Stir in the soup, shredded cheese, and seasoning.
5. Gently stir in the cooked pasta or noodles and drained fish or seafood.
6. Pour into a 1 1/2 quart casserole dish. Cover and bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
7. Uncover and sprinkle with Crunchy Topping. Bake an additional 5 minutes.
CRUNCHY TOPPING:
Combine 1 cup soft bread crumbs and 2 tablespoons melted butter, or use 1 cup crushed potato chips, toasted 1/2 cup slivered almonds, canned French Fried Onion Rings, or chow mein noodles.
